author: iam4x
subject: v2.1.0-beta.3
body: # [2.1.0-beta.3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.0.0...v2.1.0-beta.3) (2017-08-08) ### Bug Fixes * **theme:** handle :hover on buttons and links ([3978c77](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/3978c77)) ### Features * **doc:** Add a guide for opensearch ([b278710](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/b278710)), closes [#2088](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2088) * **publish-script:** re-write as js script, allow beta releases ([#2263](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2263)) ([a9612c8](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/a9612c8))
